title: Numerical solution of equations
summary: 9709 P2 numerical methods — sign change, iteration, and convergence with GeoGebra root finder.
learningObjectives: Locate roots using change of sign.

simpleExplanation.title: Approximate roots on P2
simpleExplanation.summary: When algebra fails, iterate x_{n+1} = g(x_n). Convergence requires |g′(x)| < 1 near the root.
steps: Tabulate x₀, x₁, x₂, … to required accuracy.
Sketch cobweb if asked to explain failure.

sections.content: **P2 numerical methods** (2.6) mirror **P3** (3.6) at simpler level. Always show **at least 3 iterations**.

sections.label: Mark a P2 numerical methods question
